name: pacx-run
description: Run PACX CLI commands for Power Platform automation – Dataverse, ALM, AI Builder, and governance
helpMarkDown: Run any PACX CLI command. See https://github.com/edithatogo/Greg.Xrm.Command for command reference.
author: Greg.Xrm.Command Contributors

inputs.name: command
inputs.label: PACX Command
inputs.helpMarkDown: PACX command and arguments (e.g., `forms list --tenant contoso.onmicrosoft.com`).

inputs.name: workingDirectory
inputs.label: Working Directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Working directory for the PACX command.

inputs.name: msalClientId
inputs.label: MSAL Client ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure AD app client ID for authentication.

inputs.name: msalClientSecret
inputs.label: MSAL Client Secret
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure AD app client secret for authentication.

inputs.name: tenantId
inputs.label: Tenant ID
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure AD tenant ID or domain.
